meta.title: Cotrasoft - software developer cooperative in Colombia
meta.description: Cotrasoft is a Colombian developer cooperative. We offer MVP rescue, accelerated development, and technical consulting with AI-powered senior teams.

meta.ogImageAlt: Cotrasoft - software developer cooperative in Colombia

faq.question: What is Cotrasoft?
faq.answer: Cotrasoft is a software developer cooperative based in Colombia. We operate under a solidarity economy model, combining senior talent with artificial intelligence to deliver high-quality software.

faq.question: What development services does Cotrasoft offer?
faq.answer: We offer three main services: MVP rescue (code audit and fix for technical debt in 2 weeks), accelerated development (senior teams with AI delivering functional software in days), and technical consulting (architecture assessment and technical roadmaps).

faq.question: How can I join the Cotrasoft cooperative?
faq.answer: You can join by filling out the contact form on our website or emailing us at gerencia@cotrasoft.co. We are open to Colombian developers who want to be part of our cooperative model.

faq.question: What are the benefits of being a Cotrasoft member?
faq.answer: Members enjoy access to cooperative credits, continuous education and training, a collaborative community, technical mentorship, participation in international projects, and profit sharing and decision-making involvement.

faq.question: Where is Cotrasoft located?
faq.answer: Cotrasoft is based in Colombia and works with clients across Latin America and worldwide. Our team operates remotely, allowing us to offer nearshore development services to companies in North America and Europe.

hero.heading: Your tech future deserves more than just a salary
hero.subheading: Professional growth, financial support, and community in one place

services.heading: Our services
services.subheading: Senior teams powered by AI delivering functional software in days, not months. Structured sprints with clear scopes and predictable outcomes.

rescue.title: MVP rescue
rescue.description: Your MVP was built with AI or by a junior team and has critical technical debt. In a 2-week sprint we audit, fix, and instrument your code to eliminate launch risks.

accelerated.title: Accelerated development
accelerated.description: Teams of senior Colombian developers, augmented with cutting-edge AI models, compress development cycles. Usable software delivered in days with built-in security and full code ownership.

consulting.title: Technical consulting
consulting.description: We evaluate your current architecture, identify bottlenecks, and design a technical roadmap aligned with your business goals. Informed decisions backed by cooperative expertise.

process.heading: Our process
process.subheading: 2-week sprints with clear phases and defined deliverables

phases.title: Discovery
phases.description: Technical audit, scope definition, and risk prioritization with your team.

phases.title: Execution
phases.description: Intensive development with daily deliveries, code review, and continuous deployment.

phases.title: Validation
phases.description: Integration testing, security review, and quality assurance.

phases.title: Delivery
phases.description: Production deployment, complete documentation, and knowledge transfer.
